description_cn: 把一条线的长度设定为给定值最接近的整数倍数。使直线的长度变成指定数字的整数倍。
description_en: Sets the length of a line to the nearest integer multiple of a given value. Makes the length of a line an integer multiple of a specified number.

parameters.name: Factor
parameters.desc_cn: 长度将成为此值的整数倍。
parameters.desc_en: Length will become an integer multiple of this

author: Kangaroo Team
